danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.deleteAccountDescription: Delete your account after email confirmation.
danger.deleteAccountModal: This starts account deletion. We will send a short-lived confirmation link to your email before deleting anything.
danger.emailSent: We sent an account deletion confirmation email.

method.alreadyLinked: This login method is already linked to another account.

error.deleteAccountPhrase: The account deletion confirmation phrase did not match.
error.deleteAccountInvalidLink: Invalid or expired account deletion link.
